title: Create: Numismatics Recipes
description: This datapack adds recipes for Create: Numismatics coins, and also changes the default bank terminal recipe to require Mechanical Crafters.
body: I created this simple datapack for my server/modpack, International Coalition of Nations, a political nationstate roleplay. It creates recipes for Create: Numismatics coins, based on the appearance of the coin itself. It also makes the Bank Terminal harder to craft and requires the use of Mechanical Crafting.
